title: Kibou Hope and Kaworu Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Kibou/Hope & Kaworu/Lilith             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Jun 17, 2007 9:24 am I touched on this in the 24' plothole thread, but I wanted to bring this up here to see if anyone can make anything of this. Because I have to start at the end and (kinda) work backwards, follow with me: EoE wrote: SEELE 01: At long last our hopes are to be realized.

[]: Re: Kibou/Hope & Kaworu/Lilith             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jun 17, 2007 9:58 am Especially the "emphasis" given to the word (it's capitalized) in its first usage as if it were a proper noun.

[]: Re: Kibou/Hope & Kaworu/Lilith             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Jun 17, 2007 10:16 am BrikHaus wrote: The capitalization of this word is just something done in the English language translation. There are no upper or lower case "letters" in Japanese. So, I don't think there was any extra emphasis in this case.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 17, 2007 11:16 am The nearest thing to capitalization is writing in katakana -- and Anno-sensei has a habit of making puns by judicious use of such (e.g. writing the title of Death and Rebirth so it can be equally well parsed as Apostle Rebirth).

[]:             Quote Post by sensei_juice » Mon Jun 18, 2007 11:47 am Just to point this out, I reviewed the myth of Pandora's Box, and there is a version where mankind only retains hope because Despair is kept within the box. This is a discussion I'm interested in having, but I can't quite recall what we decided in the 24' plot-hole thread - can somebody summarize it briefly?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 18, 2007 1:09 pm sensei_juice wrote: Just to point this out, I reviewed the myth of Pandora's Box, and there is a version where mankind only retains hope because Despair is kept within the box. This is a discussion I'm interested in having, but I can't quite recall what we decided in the 24' plot-hole thread - can somebody summarize it briefly?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jun 23, 2007 8:58 pm Uh, isn't Lilith/Rei the "hope that people can understand eachother"? Hence all her various lines about "did you try to understand?" etc throughout the series? While Adam/Kaworu represents the word "like/love"?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Jun 25, 2007 11:33 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Uh, isn't Lilith/Rei the "hope that people can understand eachother"? Hence all her various lines about "did you try to understand?" etc throughout the series?
